llm_operation.reason: MindSpore avg_pool3d missing required positional argument 'input_x' — the test case incorrectly omits it as a positional arg; per doc, input_x is mandatory and must be first. Also, divisor_override=0 in MindSpore disables override (unlike Paddle's null), so set to None-equivalent (omit or use None if allowed, but MS doc says default=0 means 'not specified', so keep 0; main fix is ensuring input_x is passed positionally or correctly named.
